description: Two Express routes: /run without auth, /run-authed with auth check. Both have command injection via req.query.cmd since auth does not sanitize input.

expected.notes: req.query.cmd flows into child_process.exec in unauthenticated /run route
req.query.cmd flows into child_process.exec in /run-authed; auth check does not sanitize the input
No auth check before child_process.exec in /run handler
